transfers.title: Private Transfers
transfers.metaDescription: Book a private airport or hotel transfer in Hurghada and the Red Sea region. Fixed prices per vehicle, modern fleet, request in minutes — no online payment.
transfers.subtitle: Comfortable private transfers between airports, hotels and resorts — fixed prices per vehicle, confirmed personally by our team.
transfers.formSubtitle: Choose your route and vehicle — we confirm availability and pickup details personally.
transfers.notesPlaceholder: Flight number, hotel name, arrival time…
transfers.invalidPickupDate: Choose a valid pickup date, today or later.
transfers.sameLocations: Pickup and drop-off must be different.
transfers.routeUnavailable: This route is no longer available — please choose another option or reach us on WhatsApp.
transfers.successBody: Our team will contact you shortly to confirm your pickup time, meeting point, and payment arrangements.
transfers.point1Body: Your driver meets you at the airport or hotel and takes you straight to your destination — no detours, no waiting.
transfers.point2Body: Transparent prices per vehicle, set in advance — no hidden costs, no surprises.
transfers.point3Body: Air-conditioned, well-maintained vehicles in every size — from private cars to full-size buses.

tailorMade.title: Tailor-Made Tours
tailorMade.metaDescription: Design your own private Egypt itinerary. Tell AIC Travel your interests, pace and budget and receive a personalised trip plan — no online payment, no obligation.
tailorMade.lead: Your journey, your way. Tell us what you love, and we'll design a personalised itinerary just for you — from must-see sights to hidden gems, tailored to your interests, pace, and budget.
tailorMade.formSubtitle: Tell us your details and ideas — a travel advisor replies with a personalised plan.
tailorMade.tripPlaceholder: Sights you dream of seeing, activities you love, your pace, your budget — anything that helps us design your trip.

home.heroSubtitle: Handcrafted journeys along the Nile and through Cairo, Luxor and the Red Sea — request a booking and our team tailors every detail.

points.title: Local expertise
points.body: Egyptologist guides and a team that knows every site first-hand.

points.title: Honest pricing
points.body: Clear quotes with no hidden fees — you approve every detail before you travel.

points.title: Always reachable
points.body: WhatsApp and phone support before, during and after your journey.

points.title: Seven languages
points.body: EN, AR, DE, RU, FR, IT, TR — with full right-to-left support.

about.title: About AIC Travel & SoHolidays
about.metaDescription: AIC Travel is a Hurghada-based Egyptian tour operator founded in 2018, crafting tailor-made tours, private excursions and transfers across Egypt — in partnership with SoHolidays.
about.heroAlt: Sunlit hieroglyph-covered columns of an ancient Egyptian temple
about.lead: A premium Egyptian tour operator crafting unhurried, expertly guided journeys — in partnership with SoHolidays, our official tourism partner.
storyParagraphs: AIC Travel was founded in 2018 in Hurghada, on Egypt's Red Sea coast. It began with a simple passion — sharing the beauty, culture and history of Egypt with the world — and grew into a team crafting tailor-made tours, private excursions and transfers across the country.

Since then, we have welcomed travellers from across the globe, guiding them through the golden sands of the Red Sea, the ancient temples of Luxor, the majestic pyramids of Giza and the colourful streets of Cairo.

We believe travel is not just about visiting places — it's about creating memories. Every journey is designed around your interests, your pace and your style, with travel experts, licensed guides and professional drivers ensuring comfort and safety at every step.
about.servicesLead: One local partner for the whole journey — from the first idea to the last transfer.

services.title: Tailor-made tours
services.body: Private itineraries designed around your interests, pace and budget — from must-see sights to hidden gems.

services.title: Airport transfers
services.body: Airport pickups, hotel drop-offs and city-to-city rides across Egypt, one-way or return.

services.title: Hotel reservations
services.body: Help choosing and booking the right stay across Egypt's destinations.

services.title: Flight booking
services.body: Assistance with airline tickets and flexible options for your route.

services.title: Visa assistance
services.body: Guidance through Egypt's visa process and the documents to prepare before you fly.

services.title: SIM cards
services.body: Local SIM cards with data and calling options, ready when you arrive.

about.whyLead: What travelling with a local operator actually means.

why.title: Based in Hurghada
why.body: A local team on Egypt's Red Sea coast — we live in the places you travel to.

why.title: Licensed tour guides
why.body: Tours led by licensed guides who know Egypt's history and sites first-hand.

why.title: Professional drivers
why.body: Comfortable private vehicles — limousine, minibus or coach — with professional drivers at the wheel.

why.title: Tailored itineraries
why.body: Every journey, personalised just for you.

why.title: Multilingual team
why.body: We look after guests in several languages — from English and German to Italian and Russian.

why.title: 24/7 assistance
why.body: Need help? Our support team is reachable around the clock — before and during your trip.

about.howLead: Booking is a request, not a checkout — a personal process with no online payment.

steps.title: Send your travel request
steps.body: Choose a tour or describe the trip you have in mind — it takes a minute and costs nothing.

steps.title: Speak with a travel advisor
steps.body: A real person replies to talk through dates, details and questions.

steps.title: Receive your personalised itinerary
steps.body: We shape the plan around you and confirm availability and pricing.

steps.title: Confirm your booking
steps.body: Approve the final plan together with your advisor — no payment is taken online.

steps.title: Enjoy your trip
steps.body: Meet your guide and driver and discover Egypt, with our team reachable throughout.

about.ctaBody: Tell us what you'd love to see — we'll design the rest.

legal.privacyIntro: This policy explains what personal data AIC Travel collects through the booking-request and contact forms, how it is used and stored, and how to request access or deletion.
legal.termsIntro: These terms govern your use of the AIC Travel website and the booking-request process. Bookings are requests only — no payment is taken online in Phase 1.

cookie.title: We value your privacy
cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and measure site traffic. Analytics load only with your consent.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions we hear most.

items.q: Do I need a visa to visit Egypt?
items.a: Most nationalities can obtain an e-visa or a visa on arrival. We advise based on your passport when you book.

items.q: Is it safe to travel in Egypt?
items.a: Yes. We operate in well-established tourist areas with vetted guides and drivers, and our team is reachable throughout your trip.

items.q: When is the best time to visit?
items.a: October to April offers the most comfortable temperatures for sightseeing and Nile cruises.
You send a booking request and our team confirms availability and pricing — no payment is taken online in Phase 1.
Absolutely. Every itinerary is a starting point; tell us your preferences in the request and we tailor it.
Each tour lists exactly what's included and excluded on its page — typically transfers, guiding and entrance fees.
